metadata.title: Dutig — Mobile Security Application
metadata.description: Dutig is a hardware-free mobile security app that connects everyone in your area into one security community. Enhance, connect, and verify access for condos, villages, factories, warehouses and offices.

Hero.title: Enhance your security system
Hero.subtitle: Dutig turns everyone in your area into one connected security community — no hardware required. Enhance, connect, and verify, all from one app.

Pillars.title: Three pillars of safer areas
Pillars.intro: Dutig doesn't replace the security procedures you already trust. It applies them through an app, so everyone in the area takes part in keeping it safe.

enhance.name: Enhance
enhance.title: Raise your security standard
enhance.body: Keep the procedures and structure you already use. Dutig applies those fundamentals through modern technology, making everyday security faster, clearer and safer.

connect.name: Connect
connect.title: Everyone in the area takes part
connect.body: Good security works when people participate. Dutig links residents, staff, guards and management into one connected security community.

verify.name: Verify
verify.title: Screen every entry and exit
verify.body: People, vehicles and assets entering or leaving must be identifiable and approved by the right person — reducing risk across the whole area.

HowItWorks.title: Set up security in four steps
HowItWorks.intro: No installers, no fixed equipment. Dutig runs on the smartphones and tablets your community already carries.

noHardware.title: Skip the hardware
noHardware.body: No cameras, sensors or gate controllers to buy or wire. Dutig works entirely from a mobile app on phones and tablets.

download.title: Download and register
download.body: Install Dutig from the app store. The administrator account (Manatig) registers first and designs the area's security setup.

community.title: Build your community
community.body: Add guards, residents and staff as their own account roles. Every member is screened and approved before they join.

control.title: Control and verify
control.body: Manage entry and exit, issue gate passes, and review activity and statistics — all in one place, all verified.

Roles.title: Every member carries a credential
Roles.intro: Access in Dutig works like a credential system. Each role has its own code and permissions, and serves both industrial (I) and residential (II) areas.

manatig.name: Manatig
manatig.body: Full control of the app. Designs the security setup, manages and screens every account, sees all data, and approves outsider entry and exit. Must be the first account registered.

asstManatig.name: Asst. Manatig
asstManatig.body: Reviews data and statistics and approves entry and exit — without changing the security setup itself.

guardig.name: Guardig
guardig.body: Core guard duties: scheduled patrols and incident reporting from the app.

guardigPlus.name: Guardig+
guardigPlus.body: Everything a Guardig does, plus screening-point duties: issuing gate passes and checking permission requests.

residentig.name: Residentig
residentig.body: Resident conveniences and approval of visitor entry. Home automation and home security are in development.

UseCases.title: Built for managed areas of every kind
UseCases.intro: Anywhere people, vehicles and assets move through controlled entry points, Dutig brings the whole area into one system.

Showcase.title: Everything your area needs, in one app
Showcase.intro: From sign-in to gate passes to live statistics — Dutig puts the whole security workflow on a screen everyone already knows.

signIn.title: Bilingual sign-in
signIn.body: Secure access in Thai or English, switchable in a tap.

dashboard.title: Statistics dashboard
dashboard.body: Live view of gate passes, activity and area status.

permission.title: Permission to leave
permission.body: Request and approve entry and exit, recorded and verified.

roles.title: Role management
roles.body: Add, screen and manage every account from one place.

GetApp.title: Bring your area into one security community
GetApp.intro: Download Dutig free and start with the administrator account. Setup takes minutes — no hardware, no installers.
GetApp.free: Free to download · in-app options for Manatig subscription and gate-pass packs

Footer.tagline: Hardware-free mobile security that connects everyone in your area.
